skill.sparkwitch.ceremonial_sword.name: Ceremonial Sword
skill.sparkwitch.ceremonial_sword.descri: Spend 100 mana to turn one knife into a Ceremonial Sword for 10 seconds.
skill.sparkwitch.mighty_force.name: Mighty Force
skill.sparkwitch.mighty_force.descriptio: Spend 100 mana. For 10 seconds, an empty-hand left click knocks a player back and makes one lethal attack.
skill.sparkwitch.swift_step.name: Swift Step
skill.sparkwitch.swift_step.description: Spend 50 mana to gain Speed III for 5 seconds.
skill.sparkwitch.murder_sense.name: Murder Sense
skill.sparkwitch.murder_sense.descriptio: Spend 80 mana to highlight players within 20 blocks who are holding dangerous items in red for 15 seconds.
skill.sparkwitch.healing.name: Healing
skill.sparkwitch.healing.description: Spend 60 mana to restore 3 sanity per second to nearby innocent players for 20 seconds.
skill.sparkwitch.clairvoyance.name: Clairvoyance
skill.sparkwitch.clairvoyance.descriptio: Spend 100 mana to highlight yourself in pale blue for 30 seconds and other living players in white for 10 seconds.
shop.sparkwitch.obscure.description: Obscures instinct for players outside the Witch faction for 30 seconds.
shop.sparkwitch.blindness.description: Blinds players outside the Witch faction for 20 seconds.
shop.sparkwitch.fear.description: Drains sanity from real-sanity roles outside the Witch faction for 10 seconds.
shop.sparkwitch.heaviness.description: Applies Slowness III to players outside the Witch faction for 10 seconds.
replay.death.sparkwitch.ceremonial_blade: %s had their throat sealed by %s's §5Ceremonial Sword§r
%s had their throat sealed by a §5Ceremonial Sword§r
message.sparkwitch.skill.no_skill: You do not have a witch skill.
message.sparkwitch.skill.not_witch: Only witch roles can use witch skills.
message.sparkwitch.skill.dead: You must be alive to use a witch skill.
message.sparkwitch.skill.cooldown: Your witch skill is cooling down for %s seconds.
message.sparkwitch.skill.unavailable: That witch skill cannot be used now.
message.sparkwitch.skill.ceremonial_swor: The Ceremonial Sword is already active.
You need a knife to use this skill.
